headline: APA Corporation Releases 2026 Sustainability Progress Report
summary: HOUSTON, July 07, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- APA Corporation (Nasdaq: APA) today released its 2026 Sustainability Progress Report and accompanying disclosures, highlighting progress across its sustainability priorities during 2025. The report outlines APA’s approach to sustainability management and provides updates on emissions performance, water stewardship, employee engagement and community investment. “Our sustainability report reflects the dedication of our employees and our continued commitme

headline: Shares of several energy companies are trading lower as oil prices collapse amid high supply. The coronavirus pandemic has led to a sharp decline in oil demand.
summary: Shares of several energy companies are trading lower as oil prices collapse amid high supply. The coronavirus pandemic has led to a sharp decline in oil demand.
